case.task: Add an optional string field named display_name to the generated User API client. Run the relevant tests.

finalOutput.summary: Added optional `display_name?: string` to the generated User API client via the OpenAPI source, regenerated the client, and updated tests to verify both present and omitted values. Vitest passed (2 tests), TypeScript type-checking passed, and `git diff --check` passed.
commandsRun: pnpm generate:api && pnpm test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit

node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e 'import { readFile, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises"; import { renderGeneratedClient } from "./scripts/generator-core.ts"; const schema = await readFile("api/openapi.yaml", "utf8"); await writeFile("generated/api-client.ts", renderGeneratedClient(schema), "utf8");' && sed -n '1,80p' generated/api-client.ts && pnpm test
pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff -- api/openapi.yaml generated/api-client.ts tests/client.test.ts
